resources.description: Maps student ID to student name.
Maps assignment name to total points.

invariants: Earned points must be non-negative and not exceed total points of the assignment.

interfaces.description: Retrieve the name of a student by their ID.

interfaces.signature: def create_student(student_id: str, name: str) -> None:
interfaces.description: Add a new student with given ID and name.
preconditions: Student ID does not already exist.
postconditions: Student is added to the students dict.

interfaces.description: Check if a student with given ID exists.
Return all students as a dict mapping ID to name.
Retrieve the total points of an assignment by name.

interfaces.signature: def create_assignment(assignment_name: str, total_points: float) -> None:
interfaces.description: Add a new assignment with given name and total points.
preconditions: Assignment name does not already exist.
postconditions: Assignment is added to the assignments dict.

interfaces.description: Check if an assignment with given name exists.
Return all assignments as a dict mapping name to total points.

interfaces.signature: def get_grade(student_id: str, assignment_name: str) -> Optional[float]:
interfaces.description: Retrieve the earned points for a student on an assignment.

interfaces.signature: def create_grade(student_id: str, assignment_name: str, points: float) -> None:
interfaces.description: Record a grade for a student on an assignment.
preconditions: Points are non-negative and not greater than the assignment's total points.
Grade for this student-assignment pair does not already exist.
postconditions: Grade is added to the grades dict.

interfaces.signature: def update_grade(student_id: str, assignment_name: str, points: float) -> None:
interfaces.description: Update an existing grade for a student on an assignment.
preconditions: Grade exists for the given student-assignment pair.
Points are non-negative and not greater than the assignment's total points.
postconditions: Grade is updated in the grades dict.

interfaces.signature: def grade_exists(student_id: str, assignment_name: str) -> bool:
interfaces.description: Check if a grade exists for a student on an assignment.
Return all grades as a dict mapping (student_id, assignment_name) to points.
